selector-class-pattern.message: Class names must follow BEM: block, block__element, block--modifier. See docs/adr/0007-bem-naming-convention.md

scale-unlimited/declaration-strict-value.message: Use a design token (var(--token-name)) instead of a hardcoded value. See docs/adr/0003-design-tokens-and-stylelint.md

csstools/media-use-custom-media.message: Use a breakpoint custom-media token (e.g. (--bp-md)) instead of a raw min-width/max-width value. See docs/adr/0006-mobile-first-breakpoints.md
